title: Command Map Stage Solo
summary: Added command map solo layout so the Map stage hides lane/detail columns and expands the atlas map across the bounded command surface.
proof: Added a tested command map stage mode that turns the workspace into one full-width map grid.
Hid the lane rail and selected-lane detail panel only while the Command deck's Map stage is active.
Updated mobile sizing, README, cache markers, and snapshot metadata so the standalone dashboard records the map-stage unlock.
